item.title: Version 1.4.2
item.description:
What's new in 1.4.2

  • Simpler, non-technical setup and settings language throughout the app.
  • Messaging apps now use a clearer QR-first connection flow where supported.
  • Advanced support-only settings are tucked away so users do not need files, terminal commands, or code-oriented controls.
  • Health, schedules, helpers, model selection, and local-action prompts now use plain Biome language.

item.title: Version 1.4.1
item.description:
What's new in 1.4.1

  • Connect Google now works for everyone — Gmail, Calendar, and Drive are usable by the agent immediately after Settings → Connect Google. No gcloud install, no Google Cloud project, no Gmail API toggle.
  • New bundled biome-google CLI: the OpenClaw agent calls Google APIs directly using the OAuth token Biome already manages for you, refreshed automatically in the background.
  • Token storage stays in the macOS Keychain; permissions remain revocable from Settings → Disconnect or your Google Account page.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.0

  • Messaging channels — WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord and 20+ more
  • Voice input and text-to-speech
  • Scheduled tasks (cron) with interval, cron expression, and one-shot modes
  • Multi-agent management — create, configure, and switch between agents
  • 5 new model providers: Groq, OpenRouter, Together AI, DeepSeek, and Ollama (local)
  • Diagnostics dashboard with gateway health, skill status, and log viewer

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
What's new in 1.1.0

  • 24/7 Autonomy Mode — agents now run continuously in the background
  • Unlimited data source mapping
  • Performance improvements and bug fixes
